title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-18
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the Apps
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating health metrics for all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the app directory and greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: Monitor Robot watering pixelated code-plants in a greenhouse, with Polly the bee hovering nearby holding a tiny clipboard to check off metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
